homepage.enneagramDesc: Your core motivation — Go deeper than behavior. The Enneagram reveals the why behind what you do — your fundamental drive, fear, and growth path.

faq.freeRealTitle: Is the free test really free?
faq.freeRealAnswer: Yes. You get your top 5 strengths, personality type, DISC style, and Enneagram type — all from a single 15-minute test. No credit card, no paywall for core results.
faq.resultsQualityAnswer: Our assessment uses validated personality measures from the International Personality Item Pool (IPIP), the same academic source used in peer-reviewed research. The more honestly you answer, the more accurate your results.
faq.paidDifferenceTitle: What does the paid tier include?
faq.paidDifferenceAnswer: The Full Profile unlocks all 20 strengths ranked with detailed insights, your complete 16 Personalities deep-dive, full DISC profile with communication tips, and your Enneagram wing and growth patterns. It also includes career paths matched to your profile.
faq.dataPrivacyAnswer: Your results are stored locally on your device and on our secure servers. We never sell your data. You can delete your results at any time.
faq.frameworkDifferenceTitle: How are the four frameworks different?
faq.frameworkDifferenceAnswer: Strengths shows what you naturally do best. 16 Personalities shows how you process information and make decisions. DISC shows how you communicate and come across to others. Enneagram shows your core motivation — why you do what you do. Together they give a complete picture.
faq.teamPlanTitle: Who is the Team plan for?
faq.teamPlanAnswer: The Team plan is for managers and teams who want to understand how their profiles interact. You get relationship reports, team strength maps, and meeting prep tips tailored to your team's composition.
faq.retakeAnswer: Yes. You can retake the test at any time. Your personality is relatively stable, so results tend to be consistent, but your answers may shift slightly depending on your mood or life circumstances.
